races.name: Kouniklos
races.description: Kouniklos are small, rabbit-like humanoids known for their intense energy, incredible speed and sharp senses.

feat_kouniklo_ability_increase.name: Ability Score Increase
feat_kouniklo_ability_increase.description: Increase Dex by 2 and one other by 1, or three by 1. Dex max is 22.

feat_kouniklo_hare_trigger.name: Hare-Trigger
feat_kouniklo_hare_trigger.description: Add your proficiency bonus to initiative.

feat_kouniklo_lucky_footwork.name: Lucky Footwork
feat_kouniklo_lucky_footwork.description: Reaction to add 1d4 to failed Dex save.

feat_kouniklo_rabbits_foot.name: Rabbit's Foot
feat_kouniklo_rabbits_foot.description: Reroll a 1 on a d20 test (1/Long Rest).

feat_kouniklo_rabbit_hop.name: Rabbit Hop
feat_kouniklo_rabbit_hop.description: Bonus action jump. Uses equal to PB.
